calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-19-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Carl Sauceda, #2031.

John T. Bullock, Esq. appeared for plaintiff 260 Fifth Street LLC, a Delaware Limited Liability Company.
Matt Prieshoff and Jess Herzog, witnesses for plaintiff, were placed under oath and examined.
Default was entered against defendants All Persons Claiming Any Interest in, or Lien Upon, the Real Property Herein Described, or Any Part Thereof on March 21, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff 260 Fifth Street LLC, a Delaware Limited Liability Company, and against the Defaulted Defendants All Persons Claiming Any Interest in, or Lien Upon, the Real Property Herein Described, or Any Part Thereof as follows:

Plaintiff is the owner in fee simple absolute, and in the actual and peaceable possession of the real property situated in the City and County of San Francisco, State of California, more particularly described in Exhibit 1 of the Judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
